## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod catch-up to review progress, address concerns, and align on priorities for GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Communication with clients needs extra politeness; agency satisfaction often trumps work quality](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Content delivery deadlines shifted to Thursday, leaving Friday for edits and last-minute changes](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Increased focus needed on crafting compelling titles (H1 and SEO) to boost engagement](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Ongoing issues with Galileo's internal links and URL structures require careful handling](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

## Topics

### Weekly Review and Client Updates

  - [Smooth week overall, despite ongoing grid functionality issues](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Promfu churned as expected; Prophecy, DataGrid, and Ramp accounts progressing well](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [DataGrid experiencing web design challenges; Thiago vented frustrations during sync](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### Communication and Deadline Reminders

  - [External client communication: maintain extra politeness, use "please" and "thank you"](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Content delivery: aim for Thursday completion, leaving Friday for edits/changes](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Encourage asking for help after attempting to solve issues independently](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Continuously follow up on unresolved technical issues in EPD channel](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Shift focus to crafting compelling titles (H1 and SEO) to boost engagement](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Balance headline appeal with introduction quality for better reader retention](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Galileo URL and Internal Link Issues

  - [Inconsistencies between Airtable and CMS content for some Galileo articles](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Old "RunGalileo" URLs causing 404 errors; need careful handling to avoid breaking redirects](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Action: Note issues in sheet for client to address; avoid changing URLs directly](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Process Updates and Tools

  - [Claude 4 AI launched, showing promise for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Exploring Gemini for creating podcast transcript libraries (budget: $5 million tokens)](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Transitioning podcast content creation: Ismail (Prophecy), Usman (Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Ongoing Tasks and Priorities

  - [DataGrid: 4-5 articles pending, with 3 more expected from writer](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Galileo: Continue auditing and updating internal links, prioritizing article delivery over audits](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Usman to take over Chain of Thought podcast content for Galileo](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to review Ismail's two Galileo articles in Lintana](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Ismail to demonstrate podcast grid process to Usman](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Usman to continue Galileo link audits, prioritizing article delivery](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Team to implement increased focus on title crafting](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Explore Gemini for podcast transcript libraries (Ismail)](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Complete DataGrid article scheduling (Usman)](https://fathom.video/share/4k4ZgrLx5poCYRDT4tKb5D1LvBmE_WWC?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
